name: Paratus
message: Paratus is Africa’s quality network. With an eye on the future, the group is investing in infrastructure and establishing itself as a key player in delivering integrated network services across Africa.We are ready to upload more than 84 GB of essentials corporate documents such as: NDA’s, driver licenses, passports, birth certificates, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), etc.
